scenariosBySsn.19900101-0001: New customer record (exists but owns no phone numbers)
scenariosBySsn.19851212-1234: Existing customer, no family, mixed renewal compatibility
scenariosBySsn.20020202-2222: Existing customer with one non-family number
scenariosBySsn.19660606-0606: Existing customer with large family (Unlimited Max), mixed renewal states
scenariosBySsn.19730303-0303: Existing customer, no family, mostly renewal blocked numbers
scenariosBySsn.19940404-0404: Existing customer with small active family (15 GB), all lines renewal eligible
scenariosBySsn.19880808-0808: Existing customer, no family, several renewal-eligible numbers
scenariosBySsn.19711111-1111: Existing customer, no family, single number blocked for renewal
scenariosBySsn.19991212-9999: Unknown SSN in DB (treated as NEW)

explicitExamples.label: Renewal applies
explicitExamples.explanation: Existing line owned by SSN and renewal is binding-compatible.

explicitExamples.label: Renewal blocked
explicitExamples.explanation: Existing line is in binding and marked incompatible with renewal offer.

explicitExamples.label: Family renewal blocked
explicitExamples.explanation: Existing family line in binding with blocked renewal compatibility.

explicitExamples.label: New-line offer on existing owner
explicitExamples.explanation: MSISDN is not owned by SSN, so line is treated as new-line offer.

explicitExamples.label: Large family mixed: blocked
explicitExamples.explanation: Unlimited Max family account where one line is blocked for renewal.

explicitExamples.label: Large family mixed: eligible
explicitExamples.explanation: Unlimited Max family account where renewal remains eligible.

explicitExamples.label: Mostly blocked account
explicitExamples.explanation: No-family customer where this number is in binding and blocked.

explicitExamples.label: Blocked account eligible line
explicitExamples.explanation: Same account includes one line that is renewal compatible.

explicitExamples.label: Single blocked number
explicitExamples.explanation: No-family customer with one owned line that is blocked for renewal.

explicitExamples.label: Completely new customer
explicitExamples.explanation: SSN not found in DB, classified as NEW and gets new customer offer.
